dm_standards_chapter: Chapter 16 - Development Management Standards (Volume 1 Written Statement, p.403+)
fetch_method: curl.exe raw PDF download (Volume 1, 11.9MB) + local pdftotext extraction
notes: DM chapter is Chapter 16 within Volume 1 Written Statement (raw file is full Volume 1, 22.5k text lines). Standards numbered DMS16.x. Captured density (30/12 u/ha), site coverage 50/60/75/80%, plot ratio, private OS (48/55/60/75 m2), house+apartment floor areas, 22m/35m overlooking, full parking Table 16.1, rural one-off minimum site 0.2ha + sightlines (90/150/230m), AA + EIAR + other-assessment triggers (16.2).
